rationale: Educ. Code §48.304 governs day placement program allotments with fixed per-program dollar amounts. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, appraised value, or Tax Code §11.13, so the proposed change does not conflict.
quote: Sec. 48.304. DAY PLACEMENT PROGRAM OR COOPERATIVE FUNDING.
_note: No textual or operational link between this statute and the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b).
